records.m_Talk_ENG: Should we start with these ones in the front?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Should we start with these ones in the front?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Should we start with these ones in the front?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll be sending you back to the surface if you can't even handle C.O.s of this level.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll be sending you back to the surface if you can't even handle C.O.s of this level.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll be sending you back to the surface if you can't even handle C.O.s of this level.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What do you think? Feels like a witch's hut, doesn't it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What do you think? Feels like a witch's hut, doesn't it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What do you think? Feels like a witch's hut, doesn't it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: C.O.s... in the cafe basement?
records.m_Talk_DEU: C.O.s... in the cafe basement?
records.m_Talk_FRA: C.O.s... in the cafe basement?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just to avoid any misunderstandings, we're the ones who made this neighborhood safer, okay?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just to avoid any misunderstandings, we're the ones who made this neighborhood safer, okay?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just to avoid any misunderstandings, we're the ones who made this neighborhood safer, okay?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We fixed the Counterside coordinates to this location, and...
records.m_Talk_DEU: We fixed the Counterside coordinates to this location, and...
records.m_Talk_FRA: We fixed the Counterside coordinates to this location, and...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway! We don't have any foul intentions. Just know that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway! We don't have any foul intentions. Just know that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway! We don't have any foul intentions. Just know that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I will not doubt the person who offered us kindness.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I will not doubt the person who offered us kindness.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I will not doubt the person who offered us kindness.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Besides, we were the ones who insisted on helping, even though you were against it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Besides, we were the ones who insisted on helping, even though you were against it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Besides, we were the ones who insisted on helping, even though you were against it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And you eventually gave us permission, too. We have no doubts about your true intentions, Dame Laura.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And you eventually gave us permission, too. We have no doubts about your true intentions, Dame Laura.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And you eventually gave us permission, too. We have no doubts about your true intentions, Dame Laura.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm glad you trust me, but don't you think you're too trusting?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm glad you trust me, but don't you think you're too trusting?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm glad you trust me, but don't you think you're too trusting?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, Pluto and I will take this side. You two go over there.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, Pluto and I will take this side. You two go over there.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, Pluto and I will take this side. You two go over there.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Call me if things get dangerous. Okay?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Call me if things get dangerous. Okay?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Call me if things get dangerous. Okay?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Meow.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Meow.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Meow.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. Right. Understood.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha. Right. Understood.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. Right. Understood.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now then... should we start there?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now then... should we start there?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now then... should we start there?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Meow!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Meow!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Meow!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your claws are looking sharper than usual. Been itching to fight?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your claws are looking sharper than usual. Been itching to fight?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your claws are looking sharper than usual. Been itching to fight?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Meow!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Meow!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Meow!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I didn't think there'd be this many Category 2s out here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I didn't think there'd be this many Category 2s out here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I didn't think there'd be this many Category 2s out here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I might encounter some of the more menacing ones, like Evelyn said.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I might encounter some of the more menacing ones, like Evelyn said.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I might encounter some of the more menacing ones, like Evelyn said.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Hey, you two. You look like you're in danger, I'll be right there
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Hey, you two. You look like you're in danger, I'll be right there
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Hey, you two. You look like you're in danger, I'll be right there
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: If swinging my sword is all it takes, perhaps I could be of use here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If swinging my sword is all it takes, perhaps I could be of use here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If swinging my sword is all it takes, perhaps I could be of use here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wow, Chifuyu! Great job. Are you hurt?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wow, Chifuyu! Great job. Are you hurt?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wow, Chifuyu! Great job. Are you hurt?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not at all, thanks to you, my lady.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not at all, thanks to you, my lady.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not at all, thanks to you, my lady.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I guess I was the fool for worrying.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I guess I was the fool for worrying.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I guess I was the fool for worrying.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Meow...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Meow...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Meow...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Since the younger one is the bodyguard, I thought she might be strong enough, but I didn't think the kid could fight too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Since the younger one is the bodyguard, I thought she might be strong enough, but I didn't think the kid could fight too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Since the younger one is the bodyguard, I thought she might be strong enough, but I didn't think the kid could fight too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I guess being the head of a family is more than just a title.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I guess being the head of a family is more than just a title.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I guess being the head of a family is more than just a title.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Be careful not to get hurt while you fight. I'll fight with you two.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Be careful not to get hurt while you fight. I'll fight with you two.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Be careful not to get hurt while you fight. I'll fight with you two.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Understood. Let us start the extermination, Dame Laura.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Understood. Let us start the extermination, Dame Laura.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Understood. Let us start the extermination, Dame Laura.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I will offer assistance from behind.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I will offer assistance from behind.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I will offer assistance from behind.
